Default State: Cover screen visible; Start button enabled; no audio autoplay.
Feedback/Revealed State: Move to M1-S1-01 welcome video/transcript.
Accessibility/Safety: Keyboard accessible Start; image alt text; no sensitive visuals.

Trigger: Click Help or first-time player open
Default State: Dark overlay displays controls and arrows/labels.
Feedback/Revealed State: OK closes overlay. Accessibility opens modal.
Accessibility/Safety: Focus trap; Escape close; visible labels; no color-only cues.

Default State: Modal with accessibility and low-bandwidth support.
Feedback/Revealed State: Return focus to Accessibility or Help control.
Accessibility/Safety: Screen-reader title; close button; text not image-only.

Trigger: Learner reaches everyday CSO work screen
Default State: Six work area cards visible; Continue disabled.
Learner Action: Open each sector card modal and mark it explored.
Feedback/Revealed State: Visited cards show checkmarks; progress updates to 6 of 6.
Accessibility/Safety: Cards keyboard accessible; focus-managed modal; no personal data.

Default State: Six perspective cards visible; Continue disabled.
Learner Action: Open at least four perspective card modals and mark them explored.
Feedback/Revealed State: Visited cards show checkmarks; progress updates; stronger message after all six.
Completion Event: m1_inclusion_perspectives_ready=true after at least four perspectives
Accessibility/Safety: Cards keyboard accessible; focus-managed modal; no personal data.

Default State: Five connected-rights node buttons visible; Continue disabled.
Learner Action: Select each node to reveal the rights connection.
Feedback/Revealed State: Visited nodes show checkmarks; progress updates to 5 of 5.
Accessibility/Safety: Node buttons keyboard accessible; completion not color-only; no personal data.

Trigger: Learner reaches the rights-holder mindset shift screen
Default State: Service delivery and HRBA lens controls visible; knowledge check locked until both lenses are compared.
Learner Action: Compare both lenses and answer the mini knowledge check.
Feedback/Revealed State: Selected answer shows supportive HRBA lens feedback.
Completion Event: m1_rights_holder_shift_ready=true after both lenses viewed and check answered
Data Saved: Viewed lens IDs and selected answer only
Accessibility/Safety: Lens buttons and check options keyboard accessible; no personal data.

Trigger: Learner reaches the responsibility map screen
Default State: Three actor category tabs visible; matching hidden until all three are explored.
Learner Action: Explore rights-holders, duty-bearers, and supporting/facilitating actors, then match examples to categories.
Feedback/Revealed State: Matching feedback explains whether the actor role distinctions are clear.
Completion Event: m1_actor_map_ready=true after categories explored and matching checked
Data Saved: Visited category IDs and matching selections only
Accessibility/Safety: Tabs keyboard accessible; select-based matching avoids drag-only interaction; no personal data.

Trigger: Learner reaches the meaningful participation screen
Default State: Five sequential participation levels visible; scenario hidden until all levels are explored.
Learner Action: Move through the process in order and answer the scenario.
Feedback/Revealed State: Selected scenario answer reveals participation feedback.
Completion Event: m1_participation_ready=true after all levels viewed and scenario answered
Data Saved: Viewed level IDs and selected scenario answer only
Accessibility/Safety: Process and scenario controls keyboard accessible; no personal data.

Type: HRBA shift process and language transformation check
Trigger: Learner reaches the services-to-rights shift screen
Default State: Pathway image and five stage controls visible; statement and activity hidden.
Learner Action: Explore all five HRBA shift stages, then select the strongest transformed project statement.
Feedback/Revealed State: Visited stages show checkmarks; statement and activity reveal after all stages; selected answer shows immediate feedback.
Completion Event: m1_hrba_shift_ready=true after all five stages explored and activity answered
Data Saved: Visited shift stage IDs and selected answer only
Accessibility/Safety: Pathway controls and answer cards keyboard accessible; completion not color-only; no personal data.

Trigger: Learner reaches the Module 1 knowledge check screen
Default State: Intro panel visible; quiz not started; top Next disabled.
Learner Action: Start the knowledge check, answer five MCQs, check each answer, review feedback, and continue from the result summary.
Feedback/Revealed State: Each checked answer reveals supportive correct or review feedback; final state shows score and compact review.
Completion Event: m1_knowledge_check_completed=true after result summary is shown and Continue to self-assessment is clicked
Data Saved: Started state, current question index, selected answers, checked questions, correctness, score, retry count, and completion status.
Accessibility/Safety: Keyboard-accessible answer buttons; aria-live feedback; text progress; no personal or community data collected.

Trigger: Learner reaches the Module 1 self-assessment screen
Default State: Assessment focus cards and six unrated statements visible; Continue and top Next disabled.
Learner Action: Select one assessment focus and rate all six self-assessment statements.
Feedback/Revealed State: Generated starting-point feedback, total score, and two suggested focus areas appear after all required selections are complete.
Completion Event: screen16_completed=true after focus and six ratings are present
Data Saved: Assessment focus, six scores, total, feedback category, suggested priority one, suggested priority two, and completion status.
Accessibility/Safety: Radio-style buttons are keyboard accessible; feedback uses text and aria-live; no personal or community data collected.

Type: Guided action planner and commitment builder
Trigger: Learner reaches the priority and action commitment screen
Default State: Six priority cards visible; action builder hidden; Continue and top Next disabled.
Learner Action: Select one or two priority areas, choose one practical action, and optionally add a short note.
Feedback/Revealed State: Action chips reveal after priority selection; generated commitment and confirmation panel reveal after action selection.
Completion Event: screen17_action_commitment_completed=true after at least one priority and one action are selected
Data Saved: Selected priority areas, selected action, generated commitment sentence, optional note, and completion status.
Accessibility/Safety: Priority cards and action chips are keyboard accessible; no personal or community data collected.

Type: Interactive takeaway wall and module completion summary
Trigger: Learner reaches the final Module 1 completion screen
Default State: Five takeaway tiles visible; return and next-module actions disabled until all takeaways are reviewed.
Learner Action: Review all five takeaway tiles, check the carried-forward action commitment, then choose a next step.
Feedback/Revealed State: Each selected takeaway appears in a focused summary panel; completion helper text changes after all five takeaways are reviewed.
Completion Event: screen18_completion_completed=true and module1_completion_completed=true after all five takeaways are reviewed
Data Saved: Reviewed takeaway IDs, Screen 18 completion status, Module 1 completion status, and completion timestamp.
Accessibility/Safety: Takeaway tiles are semantic buttons with visible selected and reviewed states; progress helper uses aria-live.

Default State: Scenario and options visible; feedback hidden.
Feedback/Revealed State: Best answer: 'That’s right...' Weaker answers: 'Not quite...' with reason and retry.
Accessibility/Safety: Use fictional scenario only; no free-text real case entry.

Default State: Reveal items collapsed or first item visible.
Feedback/Revealed State: Each item shows what changes when asking rights-based questions.
Completion Event: reveal_completed=true after all items opened or continue policy
Accessibility/Safety: Text list alternative; no essential animation-only content.

Default State: Four examples and four categories visible; no selections.
Learner Action: Assign each example to category using tap/select, not only drag.
Feedback/Revealed State: Correct: Good choice + explanation. Incorrect: Not quite + explanation + retry.
Accessibility/Safety: Non-drag alternative required; examples non-sensitive.

Default State: Practice shifts displayed as selectable chips.
Feedback/Revealed State: Show confirmation: 'This is a useful focus for later modules.'
Accessibility/Safety: No sensitive free text required.

Default State: Actors and roles visible; no matches selected.
Feedback/Revealed State: Correct/Not quite feedback explains role logic; retry allowed.
Accessibility/Safety: Non-drag alternative required; generic actor labels only.

Default State: Diagram visible with hotspots or labels.
Feedback/Revealed State: Reveal CSO bridge role, claims, responsibilities, accountability.
Accessibility/Safety: Full text alternative required.

Default State: One item at a time or grouped by domain; scale visible.
Feedback/Revealed State: Validation: all required; N/A excluded from numeric score.
Accessibility/Safety: Private by default; no real cases; no public score.

Default State: Result summary hidden until submit.
Feedback/Revealed State: Show band, domain feedback, and interpretation; no judgmental language.
Accessibility/Safety: Text labels, no color-only meaning.

Default State: Priority domains displayed as checkboxes.
Feedback/Revealed State: If fewer/more than two, show gentle validation. If exactly two, enable continue.
Accessibility/Safety: Accessible checkboxes; not public.

Default State: Summary visible; optional note empty; safety warning visible.
Learner Action: Save summary; optional note or skip note.
Feedback/Revealed State: Confirm saved privately. Optional note never required.
Data Saved: Private summary, timestamp; optional note if entered
Accessibility/Safety: Text warning: no sensitive data.

Default State: Quiz intro then questions; answers unselected.
Feedback/Revealed State: Show feedback per item or summary; no certificate effect.
Accessibility/Safety: Accessible MCQ; adult-learning feedback; retry if enabled.

Default State: Tabs visible; first tab active.
Feedback/Revealed State: Each tab shows key takeaway and practice implication.
Completion Event: module_summary_viewed=true after tabs opened or continue policy
Accessibility/Safety: Keyboard tabs; full text alternative.

Trigger: Required completion rules met and final screen reached
Default State: Completion message visible; Return to Course Page button.
Feedback/Revealed State: Close/return to LMS; update progress.
Accessibility/Safety: Text + icon confirmation; no sensitive data shown.
